items.name: hero-basic
items.title: Hero Basic
items.docs:
Payload Components installs this as a Payload CMS block for the Payload website starter shape.

Recommended install:

```bash
pnpm payload-components add hero-basic
```

Direct shadcn install URL:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://<your-domain>/r/hero-basic.json
```

Direct shadcn installs only copy the block source files and shadcn UI dependencies. Use `payload-components add hero-basic` when you also want Payload layout registration, `RenderBlocks` wiring, `generate:types`, and `generate:importmap` handled for you.
